Kill Clip.text: Reload within 3.6s of a kill → 25% damage for 5s
Removed on stow; no splash/explosive damage

Rampage.text: Kill → stacking damage buff, max 3 stacks
Each stack lasts 5s, expiring one at a time

Frenzy.text: After 12s in combat → 15% damage, 100 Handling, 100 Reload for 7.2s
Works while stowed; dealing or taking damage refreshes it
In combat = damage within the last 5s; enhanced extends that window +0.5s

Rapid Hit.text: Precision hits → stacks of Rapid Hit (max 5), 2s each
Up to 25 Stability and 60 Reload Speed at 5 stacks

Demolitionist.text: Kill → 11% grenade energy (22% with Snipers / Shotguns / Glaives / Fusions)
Using your grenade reloads the mag · 3s cooldown

Incandescent.text: Kill → Solar explosion applying 30 Scorch (45 with Ember of Ashes)
Killing elites widens the blast to 8m and adds 15 Scorch

Voltshot.text: Reload within 5.3s of a kill → next shot Jolts, for 8s
Jolt chains Arc damage to nearby enemies

Jolting Feedback.text: Repeated hits within 3s → next hit applies Jolt
Amplified lowers the hits needed (e.g. Auto Rifles 14 → 11)

Destabilizing Rounds.text: Kill → Volatile Rounds for 4.5s and Volatile to enemies within 7m

Target Lock.text: Sustained hits ramp a damage buff from 16.73% up to 40% (PvP: 10.46% → 25%)
Max at 5 visual stacks (12.5% / 35.5% / 54.5% / 74.5% / 110.33% of the mag as hits)
≈25% average after a full 100% mag (PvP: 15.85%); 0.2s between hits; missing resets it

Vorpal Weapon.text: Bonus damage vs bosses, minibosses, vehicles and supers

Bait and Switch.text: Damage with all 3 weapons within 7s → 30% damage for 10s

Explosive Payload.text: 50% of body damage becomes an explosive detonation on impact
PvE: payload +30%, ~+15% total damage and more stagger
PvP: ~same (±1-2%); Hand Cannons -7%. Grants 5 Reload Speed

Chill Clip.text: Direct hits apply 60 Slow within 4m (40 for Micro-Missile Sidearms & Rapid-Fire Fusions)
Slow lasts 4s (PvP: 1.5s), or 8s (PvP: 2s) with Whisper of Durance
Needs ≥40% mag; once per shot. Enhanced lowers the threshold by 10% (50% → 40%)

Headstone.text: Precision kill → spawns a Stasis Crystal at the target
Making 5 crystals locks the perk for 5s

Repulsor Brace.text: Kill a Void-debuffed enemy → 45 HP Void Overshield for 8s (12s with Echo of Persistence)

Adrenaline Junkie.text: Kill → 1 stack (max 5, 4.5s); a grenade kill grants all 5

Envious Assassin.text: Kills with your other weapons → overfill this mag on swap
12.5% of mag per kill (Special/Power 22.5%), up to 100% per swap and 200% total

Reconstruction.text: Every 5.5s while stowed → loads 25% of the mag from reserves
Overfills up to double capacity; enhanced: loading delay -0.5s

One for All.text: Hit 3 separate enemies within 3s → 35% damage for 11s

Multikill Clip.text: Reload within 3.6s of 1 / 2 / 3 kills (within 3.5s of each) → 17% / 33% / 50% damage for 5s

Killing Wind.text: Kill → 40 Handling, 20 Range, 50 Mobility, 5% falloff distance for 5s
More kills extend it up to 8s

Dragonfly.text: Precision kill → elemental explosion (up to 123.89 dmg, 4.5m)

Zen Moment.text: Hits grant stacks (max 5, 1s) reducing flinch, weapon shake 15% and reticle bounce 15%

Heal Clip.text: Reload within 5.3s of a kill → Cure x2 to you, Cure x1 to allies within 15m

Slideshot.text: Slide → reloads 15% of the mag, 22 Range and Stability for 2.5s
0.3s cooldown; can re-trigger during a slide

Subsistence.text: Kills refill 10% of the mag from reserves (17% for SMGs and Autos)

Hatchling.text: Precision kill or 3 kills within 3s → spawns a Threadling

Slice.text: While active, hits Sever the target
